info.name: GradientVoronoi
info.comment: Seeded Worley/Voronoi field colour gradient paint server.

description.p: GradientVoronoi scatters deterministic feature points inside the target path bounds and maps the selected Worley field through the inherited colour ramp. Seed controls repeatability, PointCount controls feature density, WorleyMode selects the field interpretation, and WorleyMetric selects the distance metric.

field.name: Floor
field.comment: Colour ramp floor for Voronoi gradients.

description.p: The Floor value is used as the floor for Voronoi gradient colour values. It has a valid range of 0 < Floor < Multiplier.
HeightMax defines the upper bound for per-point heights used by the WEIGHTED and PEAKS Worley modes.
HeightMin defines the lower bound for per-point heights used by the WEIGHTED and PEAKS Worley modes. When HeightMin and HeightMax match, every feature point has the same height.

field.name: Jitter
field.comment: Normalised jitter for grid-distributed feature points.

description.p: Jitter ranges from 0 to 1. A value of zero uses uniform random placement; values above zero place points on a jittered grid, with larger values allowing greater movement within each grid cell.

field.name: Multiplier
field.comment: Colour ramp multiplier for Voronoi gradients.

description.p: The Multiplier value acts as a multiplier for Voronoi gradient colour values. It has a valid range of .01 < Multiplier < 10.

field.name: PointCount
field.comment: Number of seeded Voronoi feature points.

description.p: PointCount controls how many feature points are generated inside the target path bounds. The accepted range is 1 to 4096.

The Points field accepts a vector of VoronoiPoint structures that define the feature-point coordinates used by the Voronoi field. When at least one point is supplied, the procedural Seed, PointCount, HeightMin, HeightMax and Jitter fields are ignored and the field is generated from the supplied points instead.

Point coordinates are normalised to the target path bounds, with (0, 0) at the top-left of the bounds and (1, 1) at the bottom-right. The Height value is used by the WEIGHTED and PEAKS Worley modes and ignored by the distance only modes.
Seed controls the generated feature points and their heights. A value of zero derives a stable seed from the target path fingerprint.

field.name: WorleyMetric
field.comment: Distance metric for the Voronoi field.

description.p: WorleyMetric selects the distance function used when measuring each pixel against the seeded feature points.

field.name: WorleyMode
field.comment: Field mode for the Voronoi gradient.

description.p: WorleyMode selects how distances to feature points are converted into the scalar field that feeds the colour ramp.

constants.const: Distance between the nearest and second-nearest points.
Additive peaks or terrain using per-point heights.

struct.name: VoronoiPoint
struct.comment: Describes a feature point for the GradientVoronoi Points field.
struct.field: The X coordinate of the feature point.
The Y coordinate of the feature point.
The per-point height used by WEIGHTED and PEAKS modes.
